ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year the student enrolled */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Current classification of the student (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "minor" TEXT /* Minor of the student (if any) */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic advisor assigned to the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("advisor_id") REFERENCES academic_advisors ("advisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student for whom the grades are recorded */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the semester during which the grades were recorded */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the grades recorded */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Classification of the student (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "total_grades" INTEGER /* Total number of grades recorded for the student */,
  "grade_A" REAL /* Percentage of A grades */,
  "grade_B" REAL /* Percentage of B grades */,
  "grade_C" REAL /* Percentage of C grades */,
  "grade_D" REAL /* Percentage of D grades */,
  "grade_F" REAL /* Percentage of F grades */,
  "grade_I" REAL /* Percentage of I grades (incomplete) */,
  "grade_W" REAL /* Percentage of W grades (withdrawn) */,
  "grade_NC" REAL /* Percentage of NC grades (no credit) */,
  "average_gpa" REAL /* Average GPA of the student */,
  "credits_attempted" INTEGER /* Total number of credits attempted by the student */,
  "credits_earned" INTEGER /* Total number of credits earned by the student */,
  "gpa_scale" TEXT /* GPA scale used (e.g., 4.0, 5.0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "classification_name" TEXT /* Name of the classification (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the classification */,
  "min_credits" INTEGER /* Minimum number of credits required for the classification */,
  "max_credits" INTEGER /* Maximum number of credits allowed for the classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semesters" (
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each semester */,
  "semester_name" TEXT /* Name of the semester (e.g., Fall 2021) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the semester */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the semester */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the semester */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the semester is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the semester during which the enrollment occurred */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grade record associated with this enrollment */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade for the enrollment */,
  "is_audit" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the course is taken for audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_grade_id FOREIGN KEY ("grade_id") REFERENCES grades ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_advisors" (
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic advisor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the advisor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the advisor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the advisor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the advisor belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the advisor (e.g., Professor, Associate Professor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advisor_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advisor assignment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student assigned to an advisor */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advisor assigned to the student */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the advisor was assigned to the student */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment ended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advisor_assignments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advisor_assignments_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("advisor_id") REFERENCES academic_advisors ("advisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the review */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advisor who conducted the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numeric rating for the performance review (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("advisor_id") REFERENCES academic_advisors ("advisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student undergoing the intervention */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of intervention (e.g., tutoring, counseling) */,
  "date_initiated" TEXT /* Date when the intervention was initiated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advisor who initiated the intervention */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the intervention (e.g., success, ongoing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("advisor_id") REFERENCES academic_advisors ("advisor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student for whom the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included within the report */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advisor who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., annual, mid-term) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("advisor_id") REFERENCES academic_advisors ("advisor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grade_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the grade category (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grade category */,
  "min_gpa" REAL /* Minimum GPA for the grade category */,
  "max_gpa" REAL /* Maximum GPA for the grade category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grade_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics record */,
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification represented */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistics */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the classification */,
  "average_gpa" REAL /* Average GPA across the classification */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the semester during which the statistics were calculated */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department for which the statistics are calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grade_statistics_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grade_statistics_classification_id FOREIGN KEY ("classification_id") REFERENCES classifications ("classification_id")
)
